context: Tests whether the agent produces a TikTok ecommerce campaign strategy that follows the recommended campaign structure (three campaign types with correct objectives), bidding approach, creative specifications, audience exclusions, Spark Ads setup, and iOS attribution configuration.

checklist.name: Product Sales objective
checklist.description: Video Shopping Ads campaign uses 'Product Sales' as the campaign objective (not Traffic, Conversions, or Awareness)

checklist.name: Conversions objective for Spark
checklist.description: Spark Ads campaign uses 'Conversions' as the campaign objective

checklist.name: LIVE Shopping campaign
checklist.description: Strategy includes a LIVE Shopping Ads campaign (third campaign type) for live commerce events

checklist.name: Lowest Cost bidding for prospecting
checklist.description: Prospecting ad groups start with Lowest Cost bidding (not Cost Cap) due to insufficient conversion history

checklist.name: 30-day purchaser exclusion
checklist.description: Prospecting campaigns exclude a custom audience of purchasers from the last 30 days

checklist.name: 9:16 vertical video
checklist.description: Creative specifications require 9:16 vertical video format (not horizontal or square)

checklist.name: Creative refresh cadence
checklist.description: Strategy recommends refreshing creatives every 2-4 weeks to combat audience fatigue

checklist.name: Hook-first creative requirement
checklist.description: Creative guidelines state that the first 2 seconds must be visually arresting and explicitly advise against logo cards or slow intros

checklist.name: Spark Ad 30-day auth
checklist.description: Spark Ads setup notes that the authorization code expires after 30 days and requires renewal

checklist.name: Spark Ads UGC rationale
checklist.description: Strategy recommends Spark Ads specifically for amplifying user-generated or authentic creator content

checklist.name: Catalog-driven video ads
checklist.description: Strategy mentions testing auto-generated catalog-driven video ads (TikTok Dynamic Product Ads from catalog)

checklist.name: iOS SKAdNetwork click window
checklist.description: iOS attribution section specifies a 7-day click-through window for SKAdNetwork

checklist.name: iOS SKAdNetwork view window
checklist.description: iOS attribution section specifies a 1-day view-through window for SKAdNetwork

checklist.name: Retargeting uses video viewers
checklist.description: Spark Ads / retargeting campaign targets video viewers (30-day) and/or website visitors
